records.question: Who are the members with the phone number 724-555-5721 and the email elijah.allen@lpu.edu?

records.question: Which members with the position of Vice President and the email phillip.cullen@lpu.edu have approved expenses and recorded attendance?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN expense ON member.member_id = expense.link_to_member
WHERE expense.approved = 'true' AND member.position = 'Vice President' AND member.email = 'phillip.cullen@lpu.edu'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T1.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President' AND T1.email = 'phillip.cullen@lpu.edu' AND T2.approved = 'Yes'

records.question: Which members have a major in the Civil and Environmental Engineering Department?

records.question: Which members that have recorded attendance, recorded expenses, are associated with a major, and have a zip code corresponding to the city of 'Chicopee' have a t-shirt size equal to 'X-Large'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN expense ON member.member_id = expense.link_to_member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
JOIN zip_code ON member.zip = zip_code.zip_code
WHERE zip_code.city = 'Chicopee' AND member.t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T1.member_id = T3.link_to_member INNER JOIN major AS T4 ON T1.link_to_major = T4.major_id INNER JOIN zip_code AS T5 ON T1.zip = T5.zip_code WHERE T5.city = 'Chicopee' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'
